name: stageflow
description: Standardize Codex planning workflows with durable request artifacts and validation gates.

interface.shortDescription: Plan Codex work and expose docs management skills.
interface.longDescription: Stageflow helps Codex inspect a project, clarify requirements, preserve request-specific artifacts, review plans, require explicit approval, proceed from a validated plan, and expose a docs skill for submodule-backed atomic documentation that preserves user intent, implementation state, planned changes, gaps, source-code baselines, and graph relationships.
defaultPrompt: Use Stageflow to plan this change before coding.
Use Stageflow to clarify this request and create a validated plan.
Use the docs skill to create submodule-backed project documentation.
Use the docs skill to refresh atomic.md docs from source-code changes.
Use the docs skill to inspect intent, implementation, planned changes, and gaps.
